svg.title: RouteIQ — full system architecture
svg.desc: RouteIQ architecture showing three layers: client layer at top, AWS serverless core in the middle with API Gateway, Lambda Router, Classifier, and Cache, and data and LLM provider layers at the bottom.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a client app connect to RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does a LangChain app use RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does any custom app call RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does the RouteIQ dashboard connect?')
sendPrompt('What does API Gateway do in RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside the Lambda Router function?')
sendPrompt('How does the request classifier work in RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does ElastiCache Redis work in RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does the routing decision engine work?')
sendPrompt('What data does RouteIQ store in DynamoDB?')
sendPrompt('What goes in S3 for RouteIQ?')
sendPrompt('When does RouteIQ send requests to GPT-5 Nano?')
sendPrompt('When does RouteIQ choose Claude Haiku?')
sendPrompt('When does RouteIQ route to DeepSeek?')
sendPrompt('When does RouteIQ escalate to GPT-5?')
sendPrompt('What happens to the LLM response before it goes back to the client?')
g.text: Attach savings data · log to DynamoDB

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the client receive back from RouteIQ?')
